title: Hook kind: post-comment
description: Posts a comment on the issue or PR using a template file. The template is rendered with the lifecycle event's context (issue.number, issue.title, repo, etc.) and posted via `gh issue comment` or `gh pr comment`. Per DEC-024. Idempotent: the engine writes a stable template-stamp marker comment and skips if a comment with the same stamp already exists.

template_path.description: Path to the template, relative to the capability root (e.g., `project/hook-templates/close-comment.md`). Must live under `project/` (adopter-owned per the no-shared-files invariant). The template renders with mustache-style placeholders: `{{ issue.number }}`, `{{ issue.title }}`, `{{ repo }}`, etc.

stamp_id.description: Optional stable identifier for the comment's idempotency stamp. Defaults to the template_path's basename without extension. The engine writes `<!-- pkit-hook: <stamp_id> -->` as the first line of the rendered comment and detects replay by searching existing comments for that marker.
